scripts.lint: bun run lint:js && bun run lint:beam
scripts.lint:beam: cd packages/bridge && mix format --check-formatted && mix credo --strict
scripts.fmt: cd packages/extension && bun run fmt && cd ../bridge && mix format
scripts.fmt:check: cd packages/extension && bun run fmt:check && cd ../bridge && mix format --check-formatted
scripts.test: bun run test:js && bun run test:beam
scripts.check: bun run check:js && bun run check:beam
